source_pr.title: update ambiguous check
source_pr.body:
- Use CheckReferAmbiguous to check fields ambiguous uniformly. 
- Fix panic when adding hidden aggregate field.
- Fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/337

symptoms: mustExecMatch(c, se, "select c1 as a, c1 as b from t order by c1", [][]interface{}{{1, 1}, {2, 2}}) (tidb_test.go)
